commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh For they provoked him to anger with their high places, and moved him to jealousy with their graven images. The high places, in which they imitated the pagans, and which brought on their ruin, Leviticus xxvi. With so much difficulty are people taught to serve God in spirit and truth. They foolishly imagined that they would be nearer the gods. (Berthier) Things. Protestants, "images. "They have not forgotten to insert this word as usual, to make the ignorant believe that all images are forbidden.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
